title: Stat Popup Mod
description: Displays a popup with stats when mining or placing blocks.
body:
📊 Stat Popup
Track your grind in real-time! Stat Popup is a lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that displays a sleek HUD notification whenever you mine a block or use an item.

✨ Features
Real-Time Tracking: Shows your total statistics directly on screen as you play.

Smart Display: Distinguishes between actions:

Mine Stone : 15,402 (Block Breaking)

Use Torch : 240 (Item Placing)

Use Firework Rocket : 48750 (Item use)

Visual Flair: Renders the 3D item icon next to the text for quick readability.

Multiplayer Ready: Works efficiently on servers (Hypixel, SMPs) without needing to be installed on the server side. Includes a smart synchronization system to fetch your stats instantly upon joining.

Lag-Free: Uses a predictive caching system to ensure the counter goes up smoothly, even if the server lags.

⚙️ Configuration
Fully customizable via Mod Menu and Cloth Config:

Change the X / Y position of the HUD.

📥 Installation
Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21.10.

Download the .jar and place it in your mods folder.

Dependencies required:

Fabric API

Cloth Config API

Mod Menu (Optional, for settings)
